Data: FMCSA Prospect Scanner ? Refresh Schedule
This page is regenerated on demand from the latest scanner data.

Census & fleet data: refreshed daily via SODA bulk API.
Inspections & OOS rates: refreshed daily, rolling 24-month window.
Crash totals: rolling refresh via QC API (~70 carriers/day, full cycle every 7 days).
Case studies & product mapping: static, updated when new content published.
AI analysis: generated from latest compliance data at page build time.

High Risk (7+) ?Risk Score (0-10) is the sum of weighted signals, capped at 10: Unsatisfactory rating +5, Conditional +4, OOS orders +4, Fatal crashes (3+) +4 / (1-2) +3, Vehicle OOS 2x+ avg +4 / 1.5x+ +3, Driver OOS 2x+ avg +3 / 1.5x+ +2, High crash volume (20+) +3 / (10+) +2, Large fleet + above-avg OOS +2. High = 7-10, Medium = 4-6, Low = 1-3.
